ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Classification label for the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species observed */,
  "sepal_length" REAL /* Length of the sepal in centimeters */,
  "sepal_width" REAL /* Width of the sepal in centimeters */,
  "petal_length" REAL /* Length of the petal in centimeters */,
  "petal_width" REAL /* Width of the petal in centimeters */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset where the observation was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location where the observation was made */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who collected the data */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the dataset was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., researcher, data curator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
